title: Pasco
description: Pasco is a mod that simplifies downloading resource packs and data packs in Minecraft with a single click, eliminating the hassle!
body:
## Pasco | Simplify Resource and Datapack Downloads in Minecraft

Pasco is a mod that simplifies downloading resource packs and data packs in Minecraft with a single click, eliminating the hassle!

![Overview of pasco](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68cb373e5cc5ced3c27d44ed4ea9c3f657b71d67.png)

*Pasco is still in beta... Bugs may occur!*

### How to use?
1. Download pasco with the correct version from modrinth.
2. Put `pasco-x.x.x.jar` in your fabric mods folder.
3. Launch minecraft!
4. For texture packs, go to your resourcepacks menu!
5. For data packs, when creating a new world click more -> Data Packs.
6. Install a pack by clicking on the arrow, or by selecting with up/down arrows and clicking enter!
